rag_rules: Fix unresolved references in AGREE contracts by ensuring all identifiers are visible in the current scope or declared as helpers.
Avoid introducing package-qualified identifiers in AGREE code that are not present in the analyzed model.
generic_rules: Validate that all AGREE assumptions and guarantees reference only visible AADL features or declared helpers.
Ensure type consistency between helper declarations and their assigned expressions in AGREE contracts.
Do not generate unsafe Boolean comparisons over opaque data types unless the AADL model supports numeric scalar representations.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts must be enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks within valid component type or implementation scopes.
AGREE property associations must reference valid AADL properties or helpers declared in the same scope.
anti_patterns: Do not add AGREE clauses that reference identifiers not present in the current AADL model or its configured dependencies.
Do not attempt to convert Boolean domain values into integers in AGREE contracts unless the AADL port supports numeric scalar representation.
irrelevant_topics: Component type annexes and implementation annexes
Assumptions and guarantees in component type scopes
